steps.t: Frideric the Elder is in Ost Guruth, the Ruin-hold in the Lone-lands. Mithrandir believes that the corrupted heirloom you have recovered has some conn…
Morhald and Cólbyr search the Haragmar east of Ost Guruth for artifacts such as the one that has come into your possession.
More of the Eglain may be imperiled in the swamp of Haragmar.
Aric the Stone-speaker is at Ost Haer, far to the south of Haragmar.
Elrond is at the Haven of Orladion in Rivendell, north-west of the Last Homely House. You have cleansed the corruption from the Image of the Champion,…
